news-global-econ.title: Meet Analilia Mejia, the Sanders-AOC backed progressive who just won election to Congress
news-global-econ.description: Analilia Mejia heads to Congress after a convincing special election win in New Jersey, running on Medicare for All, a $25 minimum wage and abolishing ICE.

news-global-econ.title: Long lines form at tribal gas stations as drivers chase steep discounts amid high fuel costs
news-global-econ.description: Some U.S. drivers report saving up to 75 cents per gallon by filling up at tribal gas stations in various locations, which often skip state fuel taxes on tribal land.

news-global-econ.title: Doctors in training learn cooking skills to help patients amid America's chronic disease crisis
news-global-econ.description: Future doctors are learning to prepare healthy, flavorful meals and turn nutrition advice into patient guidance in new culinary medicine programs at medical schools.

news-global-soc.title: Report: SpaceX's Starlink Outage Left Navy Drone Ships Dead in the Water
news-global-soc.description:
A global outage of SpaceX's Starlink satellite network last year left two dozen U.S. Navy unmanned vessels stranded off the California coast, disrupting communications and halting operations for nearly an hour during critical military tests.

news-global-soc.title: Battleground Dem says terrorists act from 'pain and frustration,' accuses Americans of being 'high and mighty'
news-global-soc.description: Democratic Senate candidate Abdul El-Sayed says the U.S. should try to understand why terrorists commit "heinous acts," citing pain and frustration.

news-global-soc.description:

news-global-soc.title: Kathy Ireland says faith in God is guiding her through 'shocking' betrayal by former managers
news-global-soc.description: Kathy Ireland leans into faith after filing a lawsuit alleging her former management team betrayed her and mishandled her multi-million dollar fortune.
